hero.title: Serving Algerian business, at the heart of national economic dialogue
hero.subtitle: Representing, uniting, and supporting Algerian employers and entrepreneurs.

about.homeDesc1: The National Syndical Organisation of Algerian Employers and Entrepreneurs (ONSPEA) is a major employer organization in Algeria. It works to defend the interests of businesses and actively participates in the national economic dialogue.
about.homeDesc2: Present across the country, ONSPEA unites entrepreneurs from all sectors of activity to build the economy of tomorrow together.

missions.title: Our Missions
missions.sub: What ONSPEA concretely does for its members
missions.m1desc: Defense of employer interests with ministries, Parliament, and international institutions.
missions.m2desc: Consultations on labor law, taxation, corporate law, and investment.
missions.m3desc: Seminars, workshops, and study days on current economic themes.
missions.m4desc: Inter-member networking and B2B meetings by wilaya and sector.

directory.title: Company Directory
directory.noResults: No companies found with these criteria.

membership.title: Join ONSPEA
membership.whyJoinDesc: Joining ONSPEA means joining the leading employer union organization in Algeria. We represent entrepreneurs of all sizes and sectors, from SMEs to large national companies.
membership.benefit1Desc: A strong voice with decision-makers to influence economic policies.
membership.benefit2Desc: Access to business opportunities and strategic partnerships.
membership.benefit3Desc: Expert advice to secure and optimize your business.

footer.tagline: National Syndical Organisation of Algerian Employers and Entrepreneurs — serving business since our creation.
